name: Italian Green Beans (Fdgn81a)
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen french sliced green beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the green beans according to the package instructions.
2. Drain the cooked beans.
3. Toss the beans with butter until evenly coated.
4. Sprinkle the bread crumbs and garlic powder over the beans, tossing again to combine.
5. Place the beans in a shallow casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle the grated Parmesan cheese over the top of the beans.
7. Bake, covered, at 350°F for 20 to 30 minutes, or until the cheese melts and the beans are heated through.
